CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE joined_table AS (SELECT a.id, a.value, b.description FROM test_table a JOIN another_table b ON a.id = b.id) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE complex_table AS (SELECT id, count(*) as count_value FROM test_table GROUP BY id) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
WATCH (SELECT id FROM complex_table WHERE count_value > 1);
CREATE TABLE nested_watch AS (SELECT id, value, (SELECT count(*) FROM another_table WHERE another_table.id = test_table.id) as related_count FROM test_table) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
